name: luma-agent
description: Lean Luma event evaluation monorepo with a secure MCP helper and local cache

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @luma-agent/shared && npm run build --workspace @luma-agent/helper && npm run build --workspace @luma-agent/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @luma-agent/helper && npm run test --workspace @luma-agent/cli
